falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 50-day moving average by 2.5% with volume > 200% of 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish breakout contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and pattern similarity to a prior bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% and stays there for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates strong risk-on sentiment invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' phase and blowoff score implications

falsification_conditions.condition: Fed Funds rate cut announcement of 50bps or more occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Directly contradicts the 'HOLD' signal by introducing a major policy shift that would alter market dynamics

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
